mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t.expected_date AS expectedLocalDateTime, cl.full_name AS customerName, act.name AS activityName FROM t_tran t LEFT JOIN t_customer c ON t.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_clue cl ON c.clue_id = cl.id LEFT JOIN t_activity act ON cl.activity_id = act.id
AND t.tran_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.tranNo}, '%')
AND t.stage = #{query.stage}
AND cl.full_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.customerName}, '%')
ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT t.*, t.expected_date AS expected_date, cl.full_name AS customer_name, act.name AS activity_name, u1.name AS create_by_name, u2.name AS edit_by_name, dv.type_value AS stage_name FROM t_tran t LEFT JOIN t_customer c ON t.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_clue cl ON c.clue_id = cl.id LEFT JOIN t_activity act ON cl.activity_id = act.id LEFT JOIN t_user u1 ON t.create_by = u1.id LEFT JOIN t_user u2 ON t.edit_by = u2.id LEFT JOIN t_dic_value dv ON t.stage = dv.id WHERE t.id = #{id}
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(t.money), 0) FROM t_tran t LEFT JOIN t_dic_value dv ON t.stage = dv.id WHERE dv.type_value LIKE '%成交%'
SELECT COUNT(t.id) FROM t_tran t LEFT JOIN t_dic_value dv ON t.stage = dv.id WHERE dv.type_value LIKE '%成交%'
